description: Legal document. Location: Alexandria. Dated: 4980 AM, which is 1219/20 CE, under the authority of Avraham Maimonides. Involving Yefet ha-Rofe and his wife Sitt al-[..]Mʿ, and the right of living in an upper floor. Witnesses: the teacher Berakhot b. Ḥalfon; Raṣon b. Fityān. Witnesses for the validation (qiyyum): the judge Anaṭoli b. Yosef; Shemuel b. Yaʿaqov; and Ḥafeṣ b. Yosef. (Information from Frenkel and Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
